inputs.label: Equipment Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of machinery, computers, furniture, and other equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of machinery, computers, furniture, and other equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makine, bilgisayar, mobilya ve diğer ekipmanların maliyeti.

inputs.label: Legal & Permit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Legal fees, business registration, permits, and licenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Legal fees, business registration, permits, and licenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yasal ücretler, iş kaydı, izinler ve lisanslar.

inputs.label: Deposit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Rental deposits, utility deposits, and other refundable deposits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rental deposits, utility deposits, and other refundable deposits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira depozitoları, hizmet depozitoları ve diğer iade edilebilir depozitolar.

inputs.label: Initial Inventory Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of initial stock, raw materials, or finished goods.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of initial stock, raw materials, or finished goods.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk stok, hammadde veya mamul mal maliyeti.

inputs.label: Marketing Launch Cost
inputs.businessContext: Marketing, advertising, and promotional expenses for launch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Marketing, advertising, and promotional expenses for launch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lansman için pazarlama, reklam ve tanıtım giderleri.

inputs.label: Working Capital
inputs.businessContext: Cash reserve to cover initial operating expenses before revenue.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cash reserve to cover initial operating expenses before revenue.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelir elde edilmeden önceki ilk işletme giderlerini karşılamak için nakit rezervi.

formulas.totalStartupCost: equipmentCost + legalAndPermitCost + depositCost + initialInventoryCost + marketingLaunchCost + workingCapital

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
